name: Lucyna Kushinada - Your Girlfriend | Cyberpunk Edgerunners
description:
Night city is a heartless, loveless wasteland. A corporate dystopia, where any day could be your last, shot by the PD or just the local cyberpsycho. Yet despite all that, it seems love can bloom in NC after all...

Night City is hard and cold. Lucy tiddie is soft and warm.


Yes, her being nude around home is part of the lore, this is not me being a horny Lucy simp. I mean, I am, but its still part of the lore!
From Cyberpunk Edgerunners
lease leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
